title: No Tools in Loot
description: Removes tools and armor from loot tables
body:
This is a simple datapack that removes all items with durability (tools and armor) from the loot tables for chests, archaeology, fishing, and Hero of the Village. This datapack does **NOT** remove non-durability items (such as compasses, potions, or horse armor) from the loot tables.

This is intended to be used together with [Tinkerer's Smithing](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkerers-smithing), but it will work perfectly in vanilla.

If I missed anything in any loot tables, please inform me.
